notes: W6D1 Push. Push press still hard at 50 — first set 8, second set 7 (unbalanced/unstable, dropped down), third set 8 with better stagger technique. Right shoulder still bothering but found that contracting/engaging shoulder down cracks it and helps a lot. Band rotator cuff work felt great — 12x50 cable external rotations kneeling, plus Yuri band warmup mid-session fixed the crackly feeling. Chest press machine HUGE jump: 160→170→180x8→180x4, then drop 160x2→140x4. 180x8 is insane. Lat raises at 20x15 clean for all 3 sets, then isolated 25x8 each side with full ROM. Incline DB at 55 inconsistent (10/9/10/7). Pec deck 120x12 all 3 sets. Cable lat raise right shoulder still crackly at 50 but Yuri band warmup helped. Incline overhead tri ext dying at 65x12/12/11. Straight arm pulldown 110x10/10/9 — hard day.
cardio: 12 min zone 2 run to gym + 12 min zone 2 run back

exercises.notes: Hard today. Set 2 was unbalanced — legs not staggered enough, dropped a rep. Set 3 fixed with more momentum and leg stagger. First set was too static. 50/side remains the working weight. Technique note: slight stagger stance + momentum on the dip helps stability.
20x15 all 3 sets CLEAN and felt like more was there. Added isolated 25x8 each side — full ROM! Huge jump from W5. 25 is the next working weight for full sets. Try 25x12 next week.

HUGE session. 160 easy, 170 harder but still 8, 180x8 with full ROM and maximal effort (faces and hard breathing lol). 180x4 on set 4, then drop sets 160x2→140x4 completely dead. W5 (last exercise): 140x6 was the best. Today (not last): 180x8. 40lb jump when not pre-fatigued. 180 is the real working weight.

sets: 55 x9 (died at 8, forgot to count first)
55 x10 (felt like dying but did them, more rest)
exercises.notes: Setup always feels impossible then the actual reps are fine. 10/9/10/7. Not all full ROM — not always all the way to chest. Third set got more rest which helped. Fourth set went for full ROM and died at 7. 55 still the working weight. Setup anxiety remains.

sets: 120 x12 (hard to get full ROM last 2)
exercises.notes: Bumped from 115 to 120. Easy first set, ROM struggled on set 2, then got second wind for full ROM on set 3. 120 is the new working weight. W5: 115x12 clean. Up 5lbs.
Kneeling, cable from top, rotator cuff action. Felt great — shoulder loosened up noticeably. Added mid-session as shoulder rehab. Keep this in the routine.

Right shoulder still crackly, feeling linked to elbow somehow (one muscle chain?). Used red band for Yuri shoulder warmup between sets — worked super well. Second set much better. Need more band work going forward. Dropped from W5's 55 back to 50 due to shoulder.
12/12/11. Dying on all sets. Same pattern as W5. 65 remains the working weight. Dropping form badly by end.
Hard today. 10/10/9. W5: 12/12/9. Lower reps this week — accumulated fatigue from the chest press monster sets. 110 still the working weight.

notes: KB Explore — B-Stance Flow day! New flow at 25lb (20 was taken) — 5 per side x 5 rounds. Completely drenched, amazing cardio + strength combo. Wonky first few rounds then looked like a pro by end. Cossack squats only 5 per side (legs sore). TGU at 25lb (dropped from prescribed 30 — already long session). C&P at 50 x6 instead of 8 but LEFT SIDE BREAKTHROUGH — shoulder moved it up not arms, super fluid, easiest set ever on left! Longest and hardest KB session so far.

exercises.notes: B-Stance Flow (@Asgooch). 20lb was taken so did 25. Completely drenched — this is a cardio workout disguised as KB work. First few rounds wonky, by the end looked like a pro. Took breaks between rounds. Not muscle tired like press day, more of a full-body cardio exhaustion. So fun.
Went well.
Only 5 per side instead of 8 — legs so sore from the flow squats and lunges. Snatched to each side and did reps on each side instead of alternating.
Went well.
Dropped from 30 to 25 — already a super long workout. Still good work.

6 instead of 8 — session was already massive. LEFT SIDE BREAKTHROUGH: got it resting on shoulder briefly and shoulder moved it up, not arms. Super fluid, easiest set ever on left side! Was using arms too much before. Right side found this in W3, left just caught up.
Went well.
Went well.
Finisher.

notes: Best pull day yet. Pull-ups 10/10/9/7 = 36 total, ALL CLEAN SETS — no fragmenting. The 'clean sets only' rule paid off. DB rows hit 80x7 PR! Had to brace hard, significantly harder than 75. Preacher curl consistent at 15/side (9/9/8 + drop). Lat pulldown 160x12 all 3 sets clean. Cable row on different machine (back left at 120 instead of usual back right at 130). Face pulls went heavier at 57.5x15 — form broke down on last 4 each set. Cable curls 42.5x12 all 3 sets, dying last 3 each time.
cardio: 12 min zone 2 run to gym + 12 min zone 2 run back

exercises.notes: 36 total, ALL CLEAN SETS! Best day yet. 10/10/9/7 — no fragmenting, no split sets. The 'clean sets only' rule worked. Felt way better than W5's fragmented 34. Last week was a noodle, this week is legit.
9/9/8 + drop to 10/side x6. Dying early this time compared to W5's 10/9/8. Still hard at 15/side. Consistent — not going up yet.
160x12 all 3 sets, pretty clean. Weirdly consistent today. Ready for 165 or 170 next week.
80x7 PR! Significantly harder than 75 — had to brace a lot. Hand on another weight on rack, bent over. Not too static but good ROM. 7 continuous reps. W5: 75x10 easy. The jump from 75→80 is real.

exercises.equipment: back left machine (right was taken), 120 + 10lb add-on
exercises.notes: Different machine — back left instead of usual back right. 120 + 10lb add-on plate = 130. Sitting way more upright and going slower — way harder with better form. Form improvement is the real progression here, not weight.

Went heavier but fewer reps (57.5x15 instead of 50x20). Weird machine had odd numbers. Form completely broke down on last 4 of sets 2-3. Might be too heavy — back to 50x20 clean or find a middle ground.
Hard but consistent. Form breaks on last 2 reps of sets 2-3. Speedy and not static. 25 is the right weight — own the form before going up.
42.5x12 all 3 sets — died on last 3 for all sets. Consistent. Same pattern every week. Preacher curl fatigue tax. If this is ever 3x12 clean, bump to 45.

notes: Saturday legs (shifted from Friday — KB light on Friday instead). Squats: 75x8 felt as easy as 70x8! One of those 'squats come easy' days, good form throughout. RDL rough — sore from furniture moving and Costco, back kicking in too much on first two sets, third was best with good bracing. Leg press at 6 plates super tight to start (maybe from Tuesday KB?), second and third sets way better ROM. Single leg calf raises at 4 plates per side — insanely hard! Had to stabilize with other foot on plate but each side working way harder. Leg curl consistent at 110, dropped to 90 for extra reps. Walking lunges still death but no sitting between sets anymore — real progress. Pec deck machine broken — need DB fly swap for push day.
cardio: 12 min zone 2 run to gym + 12 min zone 2 run back

exercises.notes: 75x8 felt as easy as 70x8 — huge. One of those good squat days. Good form throughout, no depth issues, felt safe and strong. This is W7's baseline now. 80/side is the next frontier.

Rough session — sore from furniture moving and Costco earlier. Back kicking in too much on first two sets. Third set was the best: slow, static, good bracing. Had to warm up with just plates. Dropped from W5's 70/side back to 65 due to soreness. Form check week paid off — noticed the back compensation and corrected it.

Super tight at start — maybe from Tuesday KB? First set hard to get full ROM. Second and third sets way better, pretty much full ROM. Incredibly hard — have to hold breath — but no shakiness like squat/RDL. Can happily push harder and feel the heaviness. Deep stretch and soreness in a way other exercises don't have. First set always the hardest, then opens up.

SWITCHED TO SINGLE LEG! 4 plates per side, one foot working, other foot on plate for balance/stabilization. Insanely hard! Not cheating — load is on one leg, other foot just prevents tipping. Way harder than bilateral at 6 plates. Each side working individually and confidently. 3x20 completed.
Each set hard at last 3, not all super clean but good workout. Dropped to 90 and did 7 more. Consistent at 110 — ok to stay here. W5: same pattern.

Still death but DON'T HAVE TO SIT DOWN BETWEEN SETS anymore! Real progress from W1 wanting to throw up. Last set massive struggle halfway through but completed. Lots of bracing difficulty from exhaustion. Getting stronger in a good way — no muscle pain, just fatigue.
